subcodes.first_line: O friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Praise be to God, thou hast become intoxicated with the wine of the love of God from the chalice of His bounties, and thy countenance hath been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیق عبدالبهاء الحمد لله از کاس الطاف سرمست باده محبت الله شدی رخ را بنور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
